scripts.test:entrypoints: node --input-type=module -e "import('./app/javascript/tree_view/index.js').then((module) => { if (typeof module.registerTreeViewControllers !== 'function') throw new Error('registerTreeViewControllers export is missing'); const expectedIdentifiers = { state: 'tree-view-state', client: 'tree-view-client', selection: 'tree-view-selection', transfer: 'tree-view-transfer', remoteState: 'tree-view-remote-state' }; if (JSON.stringify(module.TreeViewControllerIdentifiers) !== JSON.stringify(expectedIdentifiers)) throw new Error('TreeViewControllerIdentifiers export is out of sync'); const expected = [[expectedIdentifiers.state, module.TreeViewStateController], [expectedIdentifiers.client, module.TreeViewClientController], [expectedIdentifiers.selection, module.TreeViewSelectionController], [expectedIdentifiers.transfer, module.TreeViewTransferController], [expectedIdentifiers.remoteState, module.TreeViewRemoteStateController]]; const application = { calls: [], register(identifier, controller) { this.calls.push([identifier, controller]); } }; module.registerTreeViewControllers(application); if (application.calls.length !== expected.length || expected.some(([identifier, controller], index) => application.calls[index]?.[0] !== identifier || application.calls[index]?.[1] !== controller)) { throw new Error('documented tree_view entrypoint exports are out of sync'); } const expectedEventNames = { state: { stateChanged: 'tree-view-state:state-changed' }, selection: { change: 'tree-view-selection:change', selected: 'tree-view-selection:selected', limitExceeded: 'tree-view-selection:limit-exceeded', invalidPayload: 'tree-view-selection:invalid-payload' }, remoteState: { change: 'tree-view-remote-state:change', retry: 'tree-view-remote-state:retry' }, transfer: { dragStart: 'tree-view-transfer:drag-start', dragOver: 'tree-view-transfer:drag-over', drop: 'tree-view-transfer:drop', invalidPayload: 'tree-view-transfer:invalid-payload', invalidTransfer: 'tree-view-transfer:invalid-transfer' } }; const compareEventNames = (actual, expectedNames, path = 'TreeViewEventNames') => { const expectedKeys = Object.keys(expectedNames); const actualKeys = Object.keys(actual || {}); if (expectedKeys.length !== actualKeys.length || expectedKeys.some((key) => !actualKeys.includes(key))) throw new Error(path + ' keys are out of sync'); expectedKeys.forEach((key) => { if (expectedNames[key] && typeof expectedNames[key] === 'object' && !Array.isArray(expectedNames[key])) compareEventNames(actual[key], expectedNames[key], path + '.' + key); else if (actual[key] !== expectedNames[key]) throw new Error(path + '.' + key + ' is out of sync'); }); }; compareEventNames(module.TreeViewEventNames, expectedEventNames); })"
scripts.test:js: npm run test:entrypoints && npm test && npm run test:browser
